svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="embed.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="pEClEr7Ax_zbYlGFrNsN" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1244" dy="821" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="RAG 索引阶段流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="280" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="1. 输入文档
（文本、PDF、网页、数据库）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="step2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="2. 清理文档
（去噪：移除HTML标签、特殊字符）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="280" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="step3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="3. 增强文档
（添加元数据：时间戳、分类标签）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="500" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="step4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="4. 文档拆分 (Chunking)
（Text Splitter 拆分为 Segments）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="500" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow4" edge="1" parent="1" source="step4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="step5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="5. 向量化表示 (Embedding)
（OpenAI / Hugging Face 模型）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="280" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow5" edge="1" parent="1" source="step5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="step6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="6. 存储到向量数据库
（Milvus / Faiss / pgvector）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="⚡ 索引方式：离线（定时任务）或 在线（用户上传）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="380" x="220" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 输入文档
（文本、PDF、网页、数据库）

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-6JNXfP0X0tcVyvfbCOX6; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. 清理文档
（去噪：移除HTML标签、特殊字符）

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-6JNXfP0X0tcVyvfbCOX6; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. 增强文档
（添加元数据：时间戳、分类标签）

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-6JNXfP0X0tcVyvfbCOX6; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 235px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. 文档拆分 (Chunking)
（Text Splitter 拆分为 Segments）

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-6JNXfP0X0tcVyvfbCOX6; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 235px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. 向量化表示 (Embedding)
（OpenAI / Hugging Face 模型）

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-6JNXfP0X0tcVyvfbCOX6; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 235px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. 存储到向量数据库
（Milvus / Faiss / pgvector）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 338px; margin-left: 161px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ⚡ 索引方式：离线（定时任务）或 在线（用户上传）
